name: Katy Parsons Golf Club
about: The Katy Golf Club is a historic, public 9-hole facility established in 1926, featuring a mature course with tree-lined Bermuda fairways and bent-grass greens. The club offers both traditional on-course play and a high-definition golf simulator with swing analysis technology, making it accessible year-round. With flexible memberships and daily rates, it provides a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels, combining classic course design with modern amenities like a simulator and clubhouse dining.
why_golfers_like_it: High-definition golf simulator with championship course access and swing analysis
Historic, well-maintained 9-hole course with tree-lined fairways and undulating greens
Flexible membership options and affordable daily rates
Year-round practice capabilities regardless of weather
Welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Classic clubhouse favorites including burgers, sandwiches, hot dogs, pulled chicken/pork sandwiches, and sides like potato salad and mac and cheese
Beer and soft drinks sold on an open bar basis by The Katy

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided for simulator play or course play. It's recommended to bring your own equipment or inquire directly with the club.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention BYOB policies. Food and beverages are available for purchase at the clubhouse, and beer/soft drinks are sold by The Katy for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18-hole simulator play. Standard simulator rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Katy Golf Club appears to be family-friendly, offering a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels, including juniors. They also mention student memberships.
